title: Review: broadside 2026-07-18
description: Review confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Least confident areas: (1) HTTP Signature header parsing edge cases in split_signature_params — backslash handling in quoted values is subtle and untested paths may exist; (2) ActivityPub actor document key-ownership validation — the publicKey.owner check correctly blocks key substitution but the actor_uri extraction from keyId (splitting on '#') could be fooled by a keyId that contains '#' in the fragment in unexpected ways; (3) feed truncation re-sanitize — truncating at a UTF-8 boundary inside an open HTML tag and then re-sanitizing might produce a structurally different output than intended. Would raise confidence if: there were unit tests for split_signature_params with adversarial inputs, tests for process_content with pre-linked HTML, and a test that verifies truncated feed HTML is still valid.
close_reason: All 59 findings addressed. 20 fixed in code, 4 false positives, 27 accepted with ponytail comments, 6 duplicates closed, 2 won't-fix (key storage). All 16 tests passing.
